subcodes.first_line: O esteemed followers of Baha! Through the grace and favors of the Blessed Beauty - may my soul be sacrificed for His sacred dust - 'Abdu'l-Baha in London [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرات اهل بهاء عبدالبهاء در لندن از فضل و الطاف جمال مبارک روحی لعتبه تربته
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @humility; meekness; lowliness
